It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == <!--フィクション---> * {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|676|ja|676|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - 神に新穀を捧げる{{ill|Sōshoku-sai|ja|相嘗祭|12=draft|12=draft}} を初めて挙行{{要出典|date=2021-04}} * {{ill|Ken'nin|ja|建仁|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|1203|ja|1203|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Unkei|ja|運慶|12=draft|12=draft}} と{{ill|Kaikei|ja|快慶|12=draft|12=draft}} が{{ill|Tōdai-ji|ja|東大寺|12=draft|12=draft}} 南大門の金剛力士像を完成させる * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Sōmon ninbetsuchō|ja|宗門人別帳|12=draft|12=draft}} を廃止
== Births == * {{ill|Annin (era)|ja|安永 (元号)|lt=Annin|lt_ja=安永|12=draft|12=draft}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1778|ja|1778|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Kuniyoshi Ikkan-sai|ja|国友一貫斎|12=draft|12=draft}} 、{{ill|Inventor|ja|発明家|12=draft|12=draft}} （+ {{ill|1840|ja|1840|12=draft|12=draft}} ） * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1848|ja|1848|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Ueno Riichi|ja|上野理一|12=draft|12=draft}} 、{{ill|Asahi Shimbun|ja|朝日新聞|12=draft|12=draft}} 創業（+ {{ill|1919|ja|1919|12=draft|12=draft}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|686|ja|686|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Prince Ōtsu|ja|大津皇子|12=draft|12=draft}} 、皇族（* {{ill|663|ja|663|12=draft|12=draft}} ） * {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|686|ja|686|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - [[cdo:10 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初三]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|676|ja|676|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - 神に新穀を捧げる{{ill|Sōshoku-sai|ja|相嘗祭|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} を初めて挙行{{要出典|date=2021-04}} * {{ill|Ken'nin|ja|建仁|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|1203|ja|1203|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Unkei|ja|運慶|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} と{{ill|Kaikei|ja|快慶|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} が{{ill|Tōdai-ji|ja|東大寺|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 南大門の金剛力士像を完成させる * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Sōmon ninbetsuchō|ja|宗門人別帳|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} を廃止

[[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:October 3 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:October 3 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:October 3 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:October 3 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:October 3 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:October 3 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[zh-yue:十月初三]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|676|ja|676|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - 神に新穀を捧げる{{ill|Sōshoku-sai|ja|相嘗祭|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} を初めて挙行{{要出典|date=2021-04}} * {{ill|Ken'nin|ja|建仁|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|1203|ja|1203|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Unkei|ja|運慶|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} と{{ill|Kaikei|ja|快慶|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} が{{ill|Tōdai-ji|ja|東大寺|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 南大門の金剛力士像を完成させる * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 15|ja|11月15日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Sōmon ninbetsuchō|ja|宗門人別帳|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} を廃止
== Births == * {{ill|Annin (era)|ja|安永 (元号)|lt=Annin|lt_ja=安永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1778|ja|1778|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Kuniyoshi Ikkan-sai|ja|国友一貫斎|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 、{{ill|Inventor|ja|発明家|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} （+ {{ill|1840|ja|1840|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1848|ja|1848|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Ueno Riichi|ja|上野理一|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 、{{ill|Asahi Shimbun|ja|朝日新聞|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 創業（+ {{ill|1919|ja|1919|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|686|ja|686|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Prince Ōtsu|ja|大津皇子|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 、皇族（* {{ill|663|ja|663|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） * {{ill|Shuchō|ja|朱鳥|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|686|ja|686|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|October 3|qq=October 3}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|676|ja|676|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/676|qq=}} [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - 神に新穀を捧げる{{ill|Sōshoku-sai|ja|相嘗祭|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōshoku-sai|qq=}} を初めて挙行{{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * [[:en:Kennin|Ken'nin]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|1203|ja|1203|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1203|qq=}} [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Unkei|Unkei]] と[[:en:Kaikei|Kaikei]] が[[:en:Tōdai-ji|Tōdai-ji]] 南大門の金剛力士像を完成させる * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1871|ja|1871|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1871|qq=}} [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） - {{ill|Sōmon ninbetsuchō|ja|宗門人別帳|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōmon ninbetsuchō|qq=}} を廃止
== Births == * [[:en:An'ei|Annin]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1778|ja|1778|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1778|qq=}} [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） - [[:en:Kunitomo Ikkansai|Kuniyoshi Ikkan-sai]] 、{{ill|Inventor|ja|発明家|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inventor|qq=}} （+ {{ill|1840|ja|1840|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1840|qq=}} ） * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1848|ja|1848|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1848|qq=}} [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ） - [[:en:Ueno Riichi|Ueno Riichi]] 、[[:en:The Asahi Shimbun|Asahi Shimbun]] 創業（+ {{ill|1919|ja|1919|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1919|qq=}} ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|686|ja|686|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/686|qq=}} [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Prince Ōtsu|Prince Ōtsu]] 、皇族（* {{ill|663|ja|663|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/663|qq=}} ） * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|686|ja|686|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/686|qq=}} [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Princess Yamanobe|Princess Yamabe]] 、皇族 * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|790|ja|790|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/790|qq=}} [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - {{ill|Saeki Imomochi|ja|佐伯今毛人|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saeki Imomochi|qq=}} 、[[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] の貴族（* {{ill|719|ja|719|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/719|qq=}} ） * [[:en:Jōhō|Shōhō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|1074|ja|1074|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1074|qq=}} [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Empress Shōshi|Fujiwara Akiko]] （上東門院）、[[:en:Emperor Go-Suzaku|Emperor Go-Suzaku]] の母・{{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=}} の子（* {{ill|988|ja|988|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/988|qq=}} ） * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|1537|ja|1537|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1537|qq=}} [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） - It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .

{{Not to be confused with|October 3|qq=October 3}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|676|ja|676|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/676|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - 神に新穀を捧げる{{ill|Sōshoku-sai|ja|相嘗祭|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōshoku-sai|qq=}} を初めて挙行{{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * [[:en:Kennin|Ken'nin]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|1203|ja|1203|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1203|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Unkei|Unkei]] と[[:en:Kaikei|Kaikei]] が[[:en:Tōdai-ji|Tōdai-ji]] 南大門の金剛力士像を完成させる * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1871|ja|1871|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1871|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） - {{ill|Sōmon ninbetsuchō|ja|宗門人別帳|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōmon ninbetsuchō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宗門人別改帳}} を廃止
== Births == * [[:en:An'ei|Annin]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1778|ja|1778|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1778|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） - [[:en:Kunitomo Ikkansai|Kuniyoshi Ikkan-sai]] 、{{ill|Inventor|ja|発明家|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inventor|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} （+ {{ill|1840|ja|1840|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1840|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ） * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1848|ja|1848|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1848|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ） - [[:en:Ueno Riichi|Ueno Riichi]] 、[[:en:The Asahi Shimbun|Asahi Shimbun]] 創業（+ {{ill|1919|ja|1919|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1919|qq=}} ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|686|ja|686|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/686|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 600}} [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Prince Ōtsu|Prince Ōtsu]] 、皇族（* {{ill|663|ja|663|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/663|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 600}} ） * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|686|ja|686|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/686|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 600}} [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Princess Yamanobe|Princess Yamabe]] 、皇族 * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|790|ja|790|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/790|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 700|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - {{ill|Saeki Imomochi|ja|佐伯今毛人|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saeki Imomochi|qq=}} 、[[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] の貴族（* {{ill|719|ja|719|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/719|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} ） * [[:en:Jōhō|Shōhō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|1074|ja|1074|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1074|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Empress Shōshi|Fujiwara Akiko]] （上東門院）、[[:en:Emperor Go-Suzaku|Emperor Go-Suzaku]] の母・{{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} の子（* {{ill|988|ja|988|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/988|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} ） * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|1537|ja|1537|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1537|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） - {{ill|Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|ja|三条西実隆|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|qq=}} 、{{ill|poet|ja|歌人|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/poet|qq=}} （* {{ill|1455|ja|1455|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1455|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ） * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|1571|ja|1571|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1571|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） - [[:en:Hōjō Ujiyasu|Hojo Ujiyasu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=}} （* {{ill|1515|ja|1515|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1515|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ） * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1600|ja|1600|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1600|qq=}} [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Natsuka Masaie|Nagasuka Masakazu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=}} （* {{ill|1562|ja|1562|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1562|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ） * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year [[:en:Intercalation (timekeeping)|Intercalary]] ([[Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1650|ja|1650|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1650|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） - [[:en:Mōri Hidemoto|Mōri Hidemoto]] 、[[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] 主（* {{ill|1579|ja|1579|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1579|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ）

{{Not to be confused with|October 3|qq=October 3}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|676|ja|676|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/676|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - 神に新穀を捧げる{{ill|Sōshoku-sai|ja|相嘗祭|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōshoku-sai|qq=}} を初めて挙行{{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * [[:en:Kennin|Ken'nin]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|1203|ja|1203|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1203|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Unkei|Unkei]] と[[:en:Kaikei|Kaikei]] が[[:en:Tōdai-ji|Tōdai-ji]] 南大門の金剛力士像を完成させる * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1871|ja|1871|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1871|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） - {{ill|Sōmon ninbetsuchō|ja|宗門人別帳|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōmon ninbetsuchō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宗門人別改帳}} を廃止
== Births == * [[:en:An'ei|Annin]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1778|ja|1778|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1778|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） - [[:en:Kunitomo Ikkansai|Kuniyoshi Ikkan-sai]] 、{{ill|Inventor|ja|発明家|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inventor|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} （+ {{ill|1840|ja|1840|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1840|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ） * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1848|ja|1848|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1848|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ） - [[:en:Ueno Riichi|Ueno Riichi]] 、[[:en:The Asahi Shimbun|Asahi Shimbun]] 創業（+ {{ill|1919|ja|1919|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1919|qq=}} ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|686|ja|686|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/686|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 600}} [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Prince Ōtsu|Prince Ōtsu]] 、皇族（* {{ill|663|ja|663|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/663|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 600}} ） * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|686|ja|686|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/686|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 600}} [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Princess Yamanobe|Princess Yamabe]] 、皇族 * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|790|ja|790|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/790|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 700|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - {{ill|Saeki Imomochi|ja|佐伯今毛人|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saeki Imomochi|qq=}} 、[[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] の貴族（* {{ill|719|ja|719|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/719|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} ） * [[:en:Jōhō|Shōhō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:1074|1074]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Empress Shōshi|Fujiwara Akiko]] （上東門院）、[[:en:Emperor Go-Suzaku|Emperor Go-Suzaku]] の母・{{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} の子（* {{ill|988|ja|988|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/988|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} ） * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|1537|ja|1537|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1537|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） - {{ill|Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|ja|三条西実隆|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|qq=}} 、{{ill|poet|ja|歌人|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/poet|qq=}} （* {{ill|1455|ja|1455|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1455|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ） * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|1571|ja|1571|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1571|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） - [[:en:Hōjō Ujiyasu|Hojo Ujiyasu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=}} （* {{ill|1515|ja|1515|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1515|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ） * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1600|ja|1600|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1600|qq=}} [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Natsuka Masaie|Nagasuka Masakazu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=}} （* {{ill|1562|ja|1562|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1562|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ） * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year [[:en:Intercalation (timekeeping)|Intercalary]] ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1650|ja|1650|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1650|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） - [[:en:Mōri Hidemoto|Mōri Hidemoto]] 、[[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] 主（* {{ill|1579|ja|1579|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1579|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ）

* {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|676|ja|676|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/676|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - 神に新穀を捧げる{{ill|Sōshoku-sai|ja|相嘗祭|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōshoku-sai|qq=}} を初めて挙行{{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * [[:en:Kennin|Ken'nin]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Unkei|Unkei]] と[[:en:Kaikei|Kaikei]] が[[:en:Tōdai-ji|Tōdai-ji]] 南大門の金剛力士像を完成させる * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1871|ja|1871|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1871|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） - {{ill|Sōmon ninbetsuchō|ja|宗門人別帳|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōmon ninbetsuchō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宗門人別改帳}} を廃止
== Births == * [[:en:An'ei|Annin]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1778|ja|1778|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1778|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） - [[:en:Kunitomo Ikkansai|Kuniyoshi Ikkan-sai]] 、{{ill|Inventor|ja|発明家|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inventor|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} （+ {{ill|1840|ja|1840|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1840|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ） * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1848|ja|1848|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1848|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ） - [[:en:Ueno Riichi|Ueno Riichi]] 、[[:en:The Asahi Shimbun|Asahi Shimbun]] 創業（+ {{ill|1919|ja|1919|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1919|qq=}} ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|686|ja|686|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/686|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 600}} [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Prince Ōtsu|Prince Ōtsu]] 、皇族（* {{ill|663|ja|663|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/663|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 600}} ） * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|686|ja|686|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/686|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 600}} [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Princess Yamanobe|Princess Yamabe]] 、皇族 * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|790|ja|790|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/790|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 700|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - {{ill|Saeki Imomochi|ja|佐伯今毛人|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saeki Imomochi|qq=}} 、[[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] の貴族（* {{ill|719|ja|719|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/719|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} ） * [[:en:Jōhō|Shōhō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:1074|1074]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Empress Shōshi|Fujiwara Akiko]] （上東門院）、[[:en:Emperor Go-Suzaku|Emperor Go-Suzaku]] の母・{{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} の子（* {{ill|988|ja|988|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/988|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} ） * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|1537|ja|1537|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1537|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） - {{ill|Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|ja|三条西実隆|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|qq=}} 、{{ill|poet|ja|歌人|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/poet|qq=}} （* [[:en:1455|1455]] ） * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|1571|ja|1571|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1571|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） - [[:en:Hōjō Ujiyasu|Hojo Ujiyasu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=}} （* {{ill|1515|ja|1515|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1515|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ） * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1600|ja|1600|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1600|qq=}} [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Natsuka Masaie|Nagasuka Masakazu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=}} （* {{ill|1562|ja|1562|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1562|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ） * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year [[:en:Intercalation (timekeeping)|Intercalary]] ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1650|ja|1650|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1650|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） - {{Not to be confused with|October 3|qq=October 3}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|676|ja|676|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/676|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - 神に新穀を捧げる{{ill|Sōshoku-sai|ja|相嘗祭|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōshoku-sai|qq=}} を初めて挙行{{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * [[:en:Kennin|Ken'nin]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Unkei|Unkei]] と[[:en:Kaikei|Kaikei]] が[[:en:Tōdai-ji|Tōdai-ji]] 南大門の金剛力士像を完成させる * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1871|ja|1871|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1871|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） - {{ill|Sōmon ninbetsuchō|ja|宗門人別帳|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōmon ninbetsuchō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宗門人別改帳}} を廃止
== Births == * [[:en:An'ei|Annin]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1778|ja|1778|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1778|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） - [[:en:Kunitomo Ikkansai|Kuniyoshi Ikkan-sai]] 、{{ill|Inventor|ja|発明家|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inventor|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} （+ {{ill|1840|ja|1840|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1840|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ） * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1848|ja|1848|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1848|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ） - [[:en:Ueno Riichi|Ueno Riichi]] 、[[:en:The Asahi Shimbun|Asahi Shimbun]] 創業（+ {{ill|1919|ja|1919|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1919|qq=}} ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|686|ja|686|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/686|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 600}} [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Prince Ōtsu|Prince Ōtsu]] 、皇族（* {{ill|663|ja|663|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/663|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 600}} ） * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|686|ja|686|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/686|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 600}} [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Princess Yamanobe|Princess Yamabe]] 、皇族 * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|790|ja|790|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/790|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 700|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - [[:en:Empress Shōshi|Fujiwara Akiko]] （上東門院）、[[:en:Emperor Go-Suzaku|Emperor Go-Suzaku]] の母・{{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} の子（* {{ill|988|ja|988|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/988|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} ） * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|1537|ja|1537|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1537|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） - {{ill|Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|ja|三条西実隆|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|qq=}} 、{{ill|poet|ja|歌人|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/poet|qq=}} （* [[:en:1455|1455]] ） * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|1571|ja|1571|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1571|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） - [[:en:Hōjō Ujiyasu|Hojo Ujiyasu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=}} （* [[:en:1515|1515]] ） * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1600|ja|1600|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1600|qq=}} [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Natsuka Masaie|Nagasuka Masakazu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=}} （* {{ill|1562|ja|1562|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1562|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ） * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year [[:en:Intercalation (timekeeping)|Intercalary]] ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1650|ja|1650|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1650|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） - [[:en:Princess Yamanobe|Princess Yamabe]] 、皇族 * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|790|ja|790|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/790|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 700|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - {{ill|Saeki Imomochi|ja|佐伯今毛人|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saeki Imomochi|qq=}} 、[[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] の貴族（* {{ill|719|ja|719|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/719|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} ） * [[:en:Jōhō|Shōhō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:1074|1074]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - {{ill|Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|ja|三条西実隆|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|qq=}} 、{{ill|poet|ja|歌人|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/poet|qq=}} （* [[:en:1455|1455]] ） * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|1571|ja|1571|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1571|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） - revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|October 3|qq=October 3}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|676|ja|676|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/676|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - 神に新穀を捧げる{{ill|Sōshoku-sai|ja|相嘗祭|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōshoku-sai|qq=}} を初めて挙行{{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * [[:en:Kennin|Ken'nin]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Unkei|Unkei]] と[[:en:Kaikei|Kaikei]] が[[:en:Tōdai-ji|Tōdai-ji]] 南大門の金剛力士像を完成させる * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1871|ja|1871|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1871|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） - {{ill|Sōmon ninbetsuchō|ja|宗門人別帳|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōmon ninbetsuchō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宗門人別改帳}} を廃止
== Births == * [[:en:An'ei|Annin]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1778|ja|1778|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1778|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） - [[:en:Kunitomo Ikkansai|Kuniyoshi Ikkan-sai]] 、{{ill|Inventor|ja|発明家|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inventor|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} （+ {{ill|1840|ja|1840|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1840|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ） * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1848|ja|1848|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1848|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ） - [[:en:Ueno Riichi|Ueno Riichi]] 、[[:en:The Asahi Shimbun|Asahi Shimbun]] 創業（+ {{ill|1919|ja|1919|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1919|qq=}} ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|686|ja|686|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/686|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 600}} [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Prince Ōtsu|Prince Ōtsu]] 、皇族（* {{ill|663|ja|663|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/663|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 600}} ） * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|686|ja|686|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/686|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 600}} [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Princess Yamanobe|Princess Yamabe]] 、皇族 * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|790|ja|790|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/790|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 700|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - {{ill|Saeki Imomochi|ja|佐伯今毛人|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saeki Imomochi|qq=}} 、[[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] の貴族（* {{ill|719|ja|719|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/719|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} ） * [[:en:Jōhō|Shōhō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:1074|1074]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Empress Shōshi|Fujiwara Akiko]] （上東門院）、[[:en:Emperor Go-Suzaku|Emperor Go-Suzaku]] の母・{{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} の子（* {{ill|988|ja|988|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/988|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} ） * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:1537|1537]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） - {{ill|Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|ja|三条西実隆|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|qq=}} 、{{ill|poet|ja|歌人|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/poet|qq=}} （* [[:en:1455|1455]] ） * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|1571|ja|1571|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1571|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） - [[:en:Hōjō Ujiyasu|Hojo Ujiyasu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=}} （* [[:en:1515|1515]] ） * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1600|ja|1600|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1600|qq=}} [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Natsuka Masaie|Nagasuka Masakazu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=}} （* [[:en:1562|1562]] ） * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year [[:en:Intercalation (timekeeping)|Intercalary]] ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1650|ja|1650|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1650|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） - [[:en:Mōri Hidemoto|Mōri Hidemoto]] 、[[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] 主（* {{ill|1579|ja|1579|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1579|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ）

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|October 3|qq=October 3}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|676|ja|676|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/676|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - 神に新穀を捧げる{{ill|Sōshoku-sai|ja|相嘗祭|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōshoku-sai|qq=}} を初めて挙行{{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * [[:en:Kennin|Ken'nin]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Unkei|Unkei]] と[[:en:Kaikei|Kaikei]] が[[:en:Tōdai-ji|Tōdai-ji]] 南大門の金剛力士像を完成させる * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1871|ja|1871|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1871|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） - {{ill|Sōmon ninbetsuchō|ja|宗門人別帳|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōmon ninbetsuchō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宗門人別改帳}} を廃止
== Births == * [[:en:An'ei|Annin]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1778|ja|1778|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1778|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） - [[:en:Kunitomo Ikkansai|Kuniyoshi Ikkan-sai]] 、{{ill|Inventor|ja|発明家|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inventor|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} （+ {{ill|1840|ja|1840|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1840|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ） * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1848|ja|1848|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1848|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ） - [[:en:Ueno Riichi|Ueno Riichi]] 、[[:en:The Asahi Shimbun|Asahi Shimbun]] 創業（+ {{ill|1919|ja|1919|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1919|qq=}} ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|686|ja|686|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/686|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 600}} [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Prince Ōtsu|Prince Ōtsu]] 、皇族（* {{ill|663|ja|663|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/663|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 600}} ） * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|686|ja|686|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/686|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 600}} [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Princess Yamanobe|Princess Yamabe]] 、皇族 * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|790|ja|790|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/790|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 700|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - {{ill|Saeki Imomochi|ja|佐伯今毛人|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saeki Imomochi|qq=}} 、[[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] の貴族（* {{ill|719|ja|719|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/719|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} ） * [[:en:Jōhō|Shōhō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:1074|1074]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Empress Shōshi|Fujiwara Akiko]] （上東門院）、[[:en:Emperor Go-Suzaku|Emperor Go-Suzaku]] の母・{{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} の子（* {{ill|988|ja|988|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/988|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} ） * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:1537|1537]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） - {{ill|Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|ja|三条西実隆|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|qq=}} 、{{ill|poet|ja|歌人|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/poet|qq=}} （* [[:en:1455|1455]] ） * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:1571|1571]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） - [[:en:Hōjō Ujiyasu|Hojo Ujiyasu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=}} （* [[:en:1515|1515]] ） * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1600|ja|1600|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1600|qq=}} [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Natsuka Masaie|Nagasuka Masakazu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=}} （* [[:en:1562|1562]] ） * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year [[:en:Intercalation (timekeeping)|Intercalary]] ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1650|ja|1650|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1650|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） - [[:en:Mōri Hidemoto|Mōri Hidemoto]] 、[[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] 主（* [[:en:1579|1579]] ）

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|October 3|qq=October 3}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|676|ja|676|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/676|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - 神に新穀を捧げる{{ill|Sōshoku-sai|ja|相嘗祭|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōshoku-sai|qq=}} を初めて挙行{{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * [[:en:Kennin|Ken'nin]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Unkei|Unkei]] と[[:en:Kaikei|Kaikei]] が[[:en:Tōdai-ji|Tōdai-ji]] 南大門の金剛力士像を完成させる * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1871|ja|1871|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1871|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） - {{ill|Sōmon ninbetsuchō|ja|宗門人別帳|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōmon ninbetsuchō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宗門人別改帳}} を廃止
== Births == * [[:en:An'ei|Annin]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1778|ja|1778|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1778|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） - [[:en:Kunitomo Ikkansai|Kuniyoshi Ikkan-sai]] 、{{ill|Inventor|ja|発明家|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inventor|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} （+ {{ill|1840|ja|1840|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1840|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ） * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1848|ja|1848|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1848|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ） - [[:en:Ueno Riichi|Ueno Riichi]] 、[[:en:The Asahi Shimbun|Asahi Shimbun]] 創業（+ {{ill|1919|ja|1919|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1919|qq=}} ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|686|ja|686|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/686|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 600}} [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Prince Ōtsu|Prince Ōtsu]] 、皇族（* {{ill|663|ja|663|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/663|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 600}} ） * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|686|ja|686|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/686|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 600}} [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Princess Yamanobe|Princess Yamabe]] 、皇族 * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|790|ja|790|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/790|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 700|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - {{ill|Saeki Imomochi|ja|佐伯今毛人|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saeki Imomochi|qq=}} 、[[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] の貴族（* {{ill|719|ja|719|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/719|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} ） * [[:en:Jōhō|Shōhō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:1074|1074]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Empress Shōshi|Fujiwara Akiko]] （上東門院）、[[:en:Emperor Go-Suzaku|Emperor Go-Suzaku]] の母・{{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} の子（* {{ill|988|ja|988|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/988|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} ） * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:1537|1537]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） - {{ill|Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|ja|三条西実隆|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|qq=}} 、{{ill|poet|ja|歌人|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/poet|qq=}} （* [[:en:1455|1455]] ） * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:1571|1571]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） - [[:en:Hōjō Ujiyasu|Hojo Ujiyasu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=}} （* [[:en:1515|1515]] ） * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Natsuka Masaie|Nagasuka Masakazu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=}} （* [[:en:1562|1562]] ） * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year [[:en:Intercalation (timekeeping)|Intercalary]] ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） - [[:en:Mōri Hidemoto|Mōri Hidemoto]] 、[[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] 主（* [[:en:1579|1579]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|2|10|4|9|3|11|10|1003|qq=}}
==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初三]]
{{translated page|ja|10月3日 (旧暦)|version=82964880|comment=Imported full ja history}}

== Births == * [[:en:An'ei|Annin]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1778|1778]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） - [[:en:Kunitomo Ikkansai|Kuniyoshi Ikkan-sai]] 、{{ill|Inventor|ja|発明家|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inventor|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} （+ [[:en:1840|1840]] ） * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1848|ja|1848|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1848|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ） - [[:en:Ueno Riichi|Ueno Riichi]] 、[[:en:The Asahi Shimbun|Asahi Shimbun]] 創業（+ {{ill|1919|ja|1919|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1919|qq=}} ）

{{ill|Saeki Imomochi|ja|佐伯今毛人|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saeki Imomochi|qq=}} 、[[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] の貴族（* {{ill|719|ja|719|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/719|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} ） * [[:en:Jōhō|Shōhō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:1074|1074]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Empress Shōshi|Fujiwara Akiko]] （上東門院）、[[:en:Emperor Go-Suzaku|Emperor Go-Suzaku]] の母・{{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} の子（* {{ill|988|ja|988|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/988|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} ） * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:1537|1537]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） - {{ill|Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|ja|三条西実隆|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|qq=}} 、{{ill|poet|ja|歌人|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/poet|qq=}} （* [[:en:1455|1455]] ） * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:1571|1571]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） - [[:en:Hōjō Ujiyasu|Hojo Ujiyasu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=}} （* [[:en:1515|1515]] ） * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Natsuka Masaie|Nagasuka Masakazu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=}} （* [[:en:1562|1562]] ） * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year [[:en:Intercalation (timekeeping)|Intercalary]] ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） - {{Not to be confused with|October 3|qq=October 3}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .

== Births == * [[:en:An'ei|Annin]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1778|1778]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） - [[:en:Kunitomo Ikkansai|Kuniyoshi Ikkan-sai]] 、{{ill|Inventor|ja|発明家|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inventor|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} （+ [[:en:1840|1840]] ） * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1848|1848]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ） - [[:en:Ueno Riichi|Ueno Riichi]] 、[[:en:The Asahi Shimbun|Asahi Shimbun]] 創業（+ {{ill|1919|ja|1919|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1919|qq=}} ）

[[:en:Hōjō Ujiyasu|Hojo Ujiyasu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=}} （* [[:en:1515|1515]] ） * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Natsuka Masaie|Nagasuka Masakazu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=}} （* [[:en:1562|1562]] ） * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year [[:en:Intercalation (timekeeping)|Intercalary]] ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） - [[:en:Mōri Hidemoto|Mōri Hidemoto]] 、[[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] 主（* [[:en:1579|1579]] ）

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|October 3|qq=October 3}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|676|ja|676|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/676|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - 神に新穀を捧げる{{ill|Sōshoku-sai|ja|相嘗祭|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōshoku-sai|qq=}} を初めて挙行{{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * [[:en:Kennin|Ken'nin]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Unkei|Unkei]] と[[:en:Kaikei|Kaikei]] が[[:en:Tōdai-ji|Tōdai-ji]] 南大門の金剛力士像を完成させる * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） - {{ill|Sōmon ninbetsuchō|ja|宗門人別帳|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōmon ninbetsuchō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宗門人別改帳}} を廃止
== Births == * [[:en:An'ei|Annin]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1778|1778]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） - [[:en:Kunitomo Ikkansai|Kuniyoshi Ikkan-sai]] 、{{ill|Inventor|ja|発明家|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inventor|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} （+ [[:en:1840|1840]] ） * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1848|1848]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ） - [[:en:Ueno Riichi|Ueno Riichi]] 、[[:en:The Asahi Shimbun|Asahi Shimbun]] 創業（+ [[:en:1919|1919]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|686|ja|686|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/686|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 600}} [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Prince Ōtsu|Prince Ōtsu]] 、皇族（* {{ill|663|ja|663|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/663|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 600}} ） * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|686|ja|686|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/686|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 600}} [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Princess Yamanobe|Princess Yamabe]] 、皇族 * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|790|ja|790|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/790|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 700|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - {{ill|Saeki Imomochi|ja|佐伯今毛人|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saeki Imomochi|qq=}} 、[[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] の貴族（* {{ill|719|ja|719|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/719|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} ） * [[:en:Jōhō|Shōhō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:1074|1074]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Empress Shōshi|Fujiwara Akiko]] （上東門院）、[[:en:Emperor Go-Suzaku|Emperor Go-Suzaku]] の母・{{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} の子（* {{ill|988|ja|988|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/988|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} ） * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:1537|1537]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） - {{ill|Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|ja|三条西実隆|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|qq=}} 、{{ill|poet|ja|歌人|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/poet|qq=}} （* [[:en:1455|1455]] ） * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:1571|1571]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） - [[:en:Hōjō Ujiyasu|Hojo Ujiyasu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=}} （* [[:en:1515|1515]] ） * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Natsuka Masaie|Nagasuka Masakazu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=}} （* [[:en:1562|1562]] ） * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year [[:en:Intercalation (timekeeping)|Intercalary]] ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） - [[:en:Mōri Hidemoto|Mōri Hidemoto]] 、[[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] 主（* [[:en:1579|1579]] ）

* {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:676|676]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - 神に新穀を捧げる{{ill|Sōshoku-sai|ja|相嘗祭|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōshoku-sai|qq=}} を初めて挙行{{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * [[:en:Kennin|Ken'nin]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Unkei|Unkei]] と[[:en:Kaikei|Kaikei]] が[[:en:Tōdai-ji|Tōdai-ji]] 南大門の金剛力士像を完成させる * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） - {{ill|Sōmon ninbetsuchō|ja|宗門人別帳|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōmon ninbetsuchō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宗門人別改帳}} を廃止
== Births == * [[:en:An'ei|Annin]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1778|1778]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） - [[:en:Kunitomo Ikkansai|Kuniyoshi Ikkan-sai]] 、{{ill|Inventor|ja|発明家|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inventor|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} （+ [[:en:1840|1840]] ） * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1848|1848]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ） - [[:en:Ueno Riichi|Ueno Riichi]] 、[[:en:The Asahi Shimbun|Asahi Shimbun]] 創業（+ [[:en:1919|1919]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|686|ja|686|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/686|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 600}} [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Prince Ōtsu|Prince Ōtsu]] 、皇族（* [[:en:663|663]] ） * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|686|ja|686|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/686|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 600}} [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Princess Yamanobe|Princess Yamabe]] 、皇族 * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] {{ill|790|ja|790|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/790|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 700|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - {{ill|Saeki Imomochi|ja|佐伯今毛人|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saeki Imomochi|qq=}} 、[[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] の貴族（* {{ill|719|ja|719|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/719|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} ） * [[:en:Jōhō|Shōhō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:1074|1074]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Empress Shōshi|Fujiwara Akiko]] （上東門院）、[[:en:Emperor Go-Suzaku|Emperor Go-Suzaku]] の母・{{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} の子（* {{ill|988|ja|988|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/988|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} ） * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:1537|1537]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） - {{ill|Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|ja|三条西実隆|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|qq=}} 、{{ill|poet|ja|歌人|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/poet|qq=}} （* [[:en:1455|1455]] ） * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:1571|1571]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） - [[:en:Natsuka Masaie|Nagasuka Masakazu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=}} （* [[:en:1562|1562]] ） * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year [[:en:Intercalation (timekeeping)|Intercalary]] ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） - [[:en:Mōri Hidemoto|Mōri Hidemoto]] 、[[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] 主（* [[:en:1579|1579]] ）

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good.
