revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|October 3|qq=October 3}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:676|676]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - 神に新穀を捧げる{{ill|Sōshoku-sai|ja|相嘗祭|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōshoku-sai|qq=}} を初めて挙行{{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * [[:en:Kennin|Ken'nin]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Unkei|Unkei]] と[[:en:Kaikei|Kaikei]] が[[:en:Tōdai-ji|Tōdai-ji]] 南大門の金剛力士像を完成させる * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） - {{ill|Sōmon ninbetsuchō|ja|宗門人別帳|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōmon ninbetsuchō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宗門人別改帳}} を廃止
== Births == * [[:en:An'ei|Annin]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1778|1778]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） - [[:en:Kunitomo Ikkansai|Kuniyoshi Ikkan-sai]] 、{{ill|Inventor|ja|発明家|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inventor|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} （+ [[:en:1840|1840]] ） * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1848|1848]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ） - [[:en:Ueno Riichi|Ueno Riichi]] 、[[:en:The Asahi Shimbun|Asahi Shimbun]] 創業（+ [[:en:1919|1919]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:686|686]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Prince Ōtsu|Prince Ōtsu]] 、皇族（* [[:en:663|663]] ） * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:686|686]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Princess Yamanobe|Princess Yamabe]] 、皇族 * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:790|790]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - {{ill|Saeki Imomochi|ja|佐伯今毛人|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saeki Imomochi|qq=}} 、[[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] の貴族（* [[:en:719|719]] ） * [[:en:Jōhō|Shōhō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:1074|1074]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Empress Shōshi|Fujiwara Akiko]] （上東門院）、[[:en:Emperor Go-Suzaku|Emperor Go-Suzaku]] の母・{{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} の子（* {{ill|988|ja|988|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/988|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} ） * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:1537|1537]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） - {{ill|Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|ja|三条西実隆|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|qq=}} 、{{ill|poet|ja|歌人|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/poet|qq=}} （* [[:en:1455|1455]] ） * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[:en:1571|1571]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） - [[:en:Hōjō Ujiyasu|Hojo Ujiyasu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=}} （* [[:en:1515|1515]] ） * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Natsuka Masaie|Nagasuka Masakazu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=}} （* [[:en:1562|1562]] ） * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year [[:en:Intercalation (timekeeping)|Intercalary]] ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） - [[:en:Mōri Hidemoto|Mōri Hidemoto]] 、[[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] 主（* [[:en:1579|1579]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|2|10|4|9|3|11|10|1003|qq=}}
==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初三]]
{{translated page|ja|10月3日 (旧暦)|version=82964880|comment=Imported full ja history}}

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:October 3 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:October 3 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 3일]] [[ja:10月3日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十月初三]]

[[:en:Hōjō Ujiyasu|Hojo Ujiyasu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=}} （* [[:en:1515|1515]] ） * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Natsuka Masaie|Nagasuka Masakazu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=}} （* [[:en:1562|1562]] ） * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year [[:en:Intercalation (timekeeping)|Intercalary]] ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） - [[:en:Mōri Hidemoto|Mōri Hidemoto]] 、[[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] 主（* [[:en:1579|1579]] ）

{{Not to be confused with|October 3|qq=October 3}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:676|676]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - 神に新穀を捧げる{{ill|Sōshoku-sai|ja|相嘗祭|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōshoku-sai|qq=}} を初めて挙行{{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * [[:en:Kennin|Ken'nin]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Unkei|Unkei]] と[[:en:Kaikei|Kaikei]] が[[:en:Tōdai-ji|Tōdai-ji]] 南大門の金剛力士像を完成させる * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） - {{ill|Sōmon ninbetsuchō|ja|宗門人別帳|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōmon ninbetsuchō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宗門人別改帳}} を廃止
== Births == * [[:en:An'ei|Annin]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1778|1778]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） - [[:en:Kunitomo Ikkansai|Kuniyoshi Ikkan-sai]] 、{{ill|Inventor|ja|発明家|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inventor|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} （+ [[:en:1840|1840]] ） * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1848|1848]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ） - [[:en:Ueno Riichi|Ueno Riichi]] 、[[:en:The Asahi Shimbun|Asahi Shimbun]] 創業（+ [[:en:1919|1919]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:686|686]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Prince Ōtsu|Prince Ōtsu]] 、皇族（* [[:en:663|663]] ） * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:686|686]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Princess Yamanobe|Princess Yamabe]] 、皇族 * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:790|790]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - {{ill|Saeki Imomochi|ja|佐伯今毛人|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saeki Imomochi|qq=}} 、[[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] の貴族（* [[:en:719|719]] ） * [[:en:Jōhō|Shōhō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1074|1074]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Empress Shōshi|Fujiwara Akiko]] （上東門院）、[[:en:Emperor Go-Suzaku|Emperor Go-Suzaku]] の母・{{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} の子（* [[:en:988|988]] ） * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1537|1537]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） - {{ill|Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|ja|三条西実隆|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|qq=}} 、{{ill|poet|ja|歌人|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/poet|qq=}} （* [[:en:1455|1455]] ） * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1571|1571]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） - [[:en:Hōjō Ujiyasu|Hojo Ujiyasu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=}} （* [[:en:1515|1515]] ） * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Natsuka Masaie|Nagasuka Masakazu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=}} （* [[:en:1562|1562]] ） * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year [[:en:Intercalation (timekeeping)|Intercalary]] ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） - {{ill|Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|ja|三条西実隆|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|qq=|1=Sanjōnishi Sanetaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11355856}} 、{{ill|poet|ja|歌人|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/poet|qq=|1=waka poet|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11122954}} （* [[:en:1455|1455]] ） * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|Genki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1571|1571]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） - {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840372]] Wikidata name: 3rd day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 3|qq=October 3}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:676|676]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - 神に新穀を捧げる{{ill|Sōshoku-sai|ja|相嘗祭|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōshoku-sai|qq=|1=Ainame Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11581944}} を初めて挙行{{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * [[:en:Kennin|Ken'nin]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Unkei|Unkei]] と[[:en:Kaikei|Kaikei]] が[[:en:Tōdai-ji|Tōdai-ji]] 南大門の金剛力士像を完成させる * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） - {{ill|Sōmon ninbetsuchō|ja|宗門人別帳|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōmon ninbetsuchō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宗門人別改帳|1=shūmon ninbetsu aratame chō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11452068}} を廃止
== Births == * [[:en:An'ei|Annin]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1778|1778]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） - [[:en:Kunitomo Ikkansai|Kuniyoshi Ikkan-sai]] 、{{ill|Inventor|ja|発明家|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inventor|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=inventor|WD=Q205375}} （+ [[:en:1840|1840]] ） * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1848|1848]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ） - [[:en:Ueno Riichi|Ueno Riichi]] 、[[:en:The Asahi Shimbun|Asahi Shimbun]] 創業（+ [[:en:1919|1919]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:686|686]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Prince Ōtsu|Prince Ōtsu]] 、皇族（* [[:en:663|663]] ） * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:686|686]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Princess Yamanobe|Princess Yamabe]] 、皇族 * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:790|790]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - {{ill|Saeki Imomochi|ja|佐伯今毛人|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saeki Imomochi|qq=|1=Saeki no Imaemishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11382787}} 、[[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] の貴族（* [[:en:719|719]] ） * [[:en:Jōhō|Shōhō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1074|1074]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Empress Shōshi|Fujiwara Akiko]] （上東門院）、[[:en:Emperor Go-Suzaku|Emperor Go-Suzaku]] の母・{{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} の子（* [[:en:988|988]] ） * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1537|1537]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） - {{ill|Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|ja|三条西実隆|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|qq=|1=Sanjōnishi Sanetaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11355856}} 、{{ill|poet|ja|歌人|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/poet|qq=|1=waka poet|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11122954}} （* [[:en:1455|1455]] ） * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|1=Genki|2=ja|3=元亀|qid=Q1145064|lt=Genki Era|Genki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1145064}} 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1571|1571]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） - [[:en:Natsuka Masaie|Nagasuka Masakazu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} （* [[:en:1562|1562]] ） * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year [[:en:Intercalation (timekeeping)|Intercalary]] ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） - It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:676|676]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - 神に新穀を捧げる{{ill|Sōshoku-sai|ja|相嘗祭|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōshoku-sai|qq=|1=Ainame Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11581944}} を初めて挙行{{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * [[:en:Kennin|Ken'nin]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Unkei|Unkei]] と[[:en:Kaikei|Kaikei]] が[[:en:Tōdai-ji|Tōdai-ji]] 南大門の金剛力士像を完成させる * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） - {{ill|Sōmon ninbetsuchō|ja|宗門人別帳|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōmon ninbetsuchō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宗門人別改帳|1=shūmon ninbetsu aratame chō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11452068}} を廃止
== Births == * [[:en:An'ei|Annin]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1778|1778]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） - [[:en:Kunitomo Ikkansai|Kuniyoshi Ikkan-sai]] 、{{ill|Inventor|ja|発明家|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inventor|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=inventor|WD=Q205375}} （+ [[:en:1840|1840]] ） * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1848|1848]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ） - [[:en:Ueno Riichi|Ueno Riichi]] 、[[:en:The Asahi Shimbun|Asahi Shimbun]] 創業（+ [[:en:1919|1919]] ）

[[:en:Empress Shōshi|Fujiwara Akiko]] （上東門院）、[[:en:Emperor Go-Suzaku|Emperor Go-Suzaku]] の母・{{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} の子（* [[:en:988|988]] ） * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1537|1537]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） - {{ill|Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|ja|三条西実隆|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|qq=|1=Sanjōnishi Sanetaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11355856}} 、{{ill|poet|ja|歌人|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/poet|qq=|1=waka poet|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11122954}} （* [[:en:1455|1455]] ） * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|1=Genki|2=ja|3=元亀|qid=Q1145064|lt=Genki Era|Genki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1145064}} 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1571|1571]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） - [[:en:Natsuka Masaie|Nagasuka Masakazu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|qq=|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} （* [[:en:1562|1562]] ） * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year [[:en:Intercalation (timekeeping)|Intercalary]] ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） - {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840372]] Wikidata name: 3rd day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 3|qq=October 3}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:676|676]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - 神に新穀を捧げる{{ill|Sōshoku-sai|ja|相嘗祭|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōshoku-sai|qq=|1=Ainame Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11581944}} を初めて挙行{{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * [[:en:Kennin|Ken'nin]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Unkei|Unkei]] と[[:en:Kaikei|Kaikei]] が[[:en:Tōdai-ji|Tōdai-ji]] 南大門の金剛力士像を完成させる * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） - {{ill|Sōmon ninbetsuchō|ja|宗門人別帳|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōmon ninbetsuchō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宗門人別改帳|1=shūmon ninbetsu aratame chō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11452068}} を廃止
== Births == * [[:en:An'ei|Annin]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1778|1778]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） - [[:en:Kunitomo Ikkansai|Kuniyoshi Ikkan-sai]] 、{{ill|Inventor|ja|発明家|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inventor|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=inventor|WD=Q205375}} （+ [[:en:1840|1840]] ） * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1848|1848]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ） - [[:en:Ueno Riichi|Ueno Riichi]] 、[[:en:The Asahi Shimbun|Asahi Shimbun]] 創業（+ [[:en:1919|1919]] ）

{{ill|Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|ja|三条西実隆|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|qq=|1=Sanjōnishi Sanetaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11355856}} 、{{ill|poet|ja|歌人|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/poet|qq=|1=waka poet|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11122954}} （* [[:en:1455|1455]] ） * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|1=Genki|2=ja|3=元亀|qid=Q1145064|lt=Genki Era|Genki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1145064}} 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1571|1571]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） - [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初三]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初三]] {{wikidata link|Q840372}} [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]] [[Category:Non matching pagename on wikidata]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月3日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 3일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月初三]][[zh:十月初三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840372]] Wikidata name: 3rd day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 3|qq=October 3}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:676|676]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - 神に新穀を捧げる{{ill|Sōshoku-sai|ja|相嘗祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōshoku-sai|1=Ainame Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11581944}} を初めて挙行{{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * [[:en:Kennin|Ken'nin]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Unkei|Unkei]] と[[:en:Kaikei|Kaikei]] が[[:en:Tōdai-ji|Tōdai-ji]] 南大門の金剛力士像を完成させる * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） - {{ill|Sōmon ninbetsuchō|ja|宗門人別帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōmon ninbetsuchō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宗門人別改帳|1=shūmon ninbetsu aratame chō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11452068}} を廃止
== Births == * [[:en:An'ei|Annin]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1778|1778]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） - [[:en:Kunitomo Ikkansai|Kuniyoshi Ikkan-sai]] 、{{ill|Inventor|ja|発明家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inventor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=inventor|WD=Q205375}} （+ [[:en:1840|1840]] ） * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1848|1848]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ） - [[:en:Ueno Riichi|Ueno Riichi]] 、[[:en:The Asahi Shimbun|Asahi Shimbun]] 創業（+ [[:en:1919|1919]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:686|686]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Prince Ōtsu|Prince Ōtsu]] 、皇族（* [[:en:663|663]] ） * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:686|686]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Princess Yamanobe|Princess Yamabe]] 、皇族 * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:790|790]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - {{ill|Saeki Imomochi|ja|佐伯今毛人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saeki Imomochi|1=Saeki no Imaemishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11382787}} 、[[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] の貴族（* [[:en:719|719]] ） * [[:en:Jōhō|Shōhō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1074|1074]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Empress Shōshi|Fujiwara Akiko]] （上東門院）、[[:en:Emperor Go-Suzaku|Emperor Go-Suzaku]] の母・{{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} の子（* [[:en:988|988]] ） * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1537|1537]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） - {{ill|Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|ja|三条西実隆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|1=Sanjōnishi Sanetaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11355856}} 、{{ill|poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/poet|1=waka poet|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11122954}} （* [[:en:1455|1455]] ） * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|1=Genki|2=ja|3=元亀|WD=Q1145064|lt=Genki Era|Genki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1145064}} 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1571|1571]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） - [[:en:Hōjō Ujiyasu|Hojo Ujiyasu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} （* [[:en:1515|1515]] ） * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Natsuka Masaie|Nagasuka Masakazu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} （* [[:en:1562|1562]] ） * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year [[:en:Intercalation (timekeeping)|Intercalary]] ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） - [[:en:Mōri Hidemoto|Mōri Hidemoto]] 、[[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] 主（* [[:en:1579|1579]] ）

[[:en:Empress Shōshi|Fujiwara Akiko]] （上東門院）、[[:en:Emperor Go-Suzaku|Emperor Go-Suzaku]] の母・{{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} の子（* [[:en:988|988]] ） * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1537|1537]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） - {{ill|Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|ja|三条西実隆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|1=Sanjōnishi Sanetaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11355856}} 、{{ill|poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/poet|1=waka poet|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11122954}} （* [[:en:1455|1455]] ） * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|1=Genki|2=ja|3=元亀|WD=Q1145064|lt=Genki Era|Genki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1145064}} 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1571|1571]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） - It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .

* {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:676|676]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - 神に新穀を捧げる{{ill|Sōshoku-sai|ja|相嘗祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōshoku-sai|1=Ainame Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11581944}} を初めて挙行{{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * [[:en:Kennin|Ken'nin]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Unkei|Unkei]] と[[:en:Kaikei|Kaikei]] が[[:en:Tōdai-ji|Tōdai-ji]] 南大門の金剛力士像を完成させる * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） - {{ill|Sōmon ninbetsuchō|ja|宗門人別帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōmon ninbetsuchō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宗門人別改帳|1=shūmon ninbetsu aratame chō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11452068}} を廃止
== Births == * [[:en:An'ei|Annin]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1778|1778]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） - [[:en:Kunitomo Ikkansai|Kuniyoshi Ikkan-sai]] 、{{ill|Inventor|ja|発明家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inventor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=inventor|WD=Q205375}} （+ [[:en:1840|1840]] ） * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1848|1848]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ） - [[:en:Ueno Riichi|Ueno Riichi]] 、[[:en:The Asahi Shimbun|Asahi Shimbun]] 創業（+ [[:en:1919|1919]] ）

{{ill|Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|ja|三条西実隆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|1=Sanjōnishi Sanetaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11355856}} 、{{ill|poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/poet|1=waka poet|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11122954}} （* [[:en:1455|1455]] ） * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|1=Genki|2=ja|3=元亀|WD=Q1145064|lt=Genki Era|Genki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1145064}} 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1571|1571]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） - [[:en:Natsuka Masaie|Nagasuka Masakazu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} （* [[:en:1562|1562]] ） * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year [[:en:Intercalation (timekeeping)|Intercalary]] ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） - [[:en:Natsuka Masaie|Nagasuka Masakazu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} （* [[:en:1562|1562]] ） * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year [[:en:Intercalation (timekeeping)|Intercalary]] ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） - It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:676|676]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - 神に新穀を捧げる{{ill|Sōshoku-sai|ja|相嘗祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōshoku-sai|1=Ainame Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11581944}} を初めて挙行{{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * [[:en:Kennin|Ken'nin]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Unkei|Unkei]] と[[:en:Kaikei|Kaikei]] が[[:en:Tōdai-ji|Tōdai-ji]] 南大門の金剛力士像を完成させる * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） - {{ill|Sōmon ninbetsuchō|ja|宗門人別帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōmon ninbetsuchō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宗門人別改帳|1=shūmon ninbetsu aratame chō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11452068}} を廃止

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:676|676]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - 神に新穀を捧げる{{ill|Sōshoku-sai|ja|相嘗祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōshoku-sai|1=Ainame Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11581944}} を初めて挙行{{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * [[:en:Kennin|Ken'nin]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Unkei|Unkei]] と[[:en:Kaikei|Kaikei]] が[[:en:Tōdai-ji|Tōdai-ji]] 南大門の金剛力士像を完成させる * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） - {{ill|Sōmon ninbetsuchō|ja|宗門人別帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōmon ninbetsuchō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宗門人別改帳|1=shūmon ninbetsu aratame chō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11452068}} を廃止
== Births == * [[:en:An'ei|Annin]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1778|1778]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） - [[:en:Kunitomo Ikkansai|Kuniyoshi Ikkan-sai]] 、{{ill|Inventor|ja|発明家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inventor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=inventor|WD=Q205375}} （+ [[:en:1840|1840]] ） * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1848|1848]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ） - [[:en:Ueno Riichi|Ueno Riichi]] 、[[:en:The Asahi Shimbun|Asahi Shimbun]] 創業（+ [[:en:1919|1919]] ）

[[:en:Empress Shōshi|Fujiwara Akiko]] （上東門院）、[[:en:Emperor Go-Suzaku|Emperor Go-Suzaku]] の母・{{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} の子（* [[:en:988|988]] ） * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1537|1537]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） - {{ill|Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|ja|三条西実隆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|1=Sanjōnishi Sanetaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11355856}} 、{{ill|poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/poet|1=waka poet|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11122954}} （* [[:en:1455|1455]] ） * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|1=Genki|2=ja|3=元亀|WD=Q1145064|lt=Genki Era|Genki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1145064}} 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1571|1571]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） - [[:en:Hōjō Ujiyasu|Hojo Ujiyasu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} （* [[:en:1515|1515]] ） * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Natsuka Masaie|Nagasuka Masakazu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} （* [[:en:1562|1562]] ） * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year [[:en:Intercalation (timekeeping)|Intercalary]] ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） - == Deaths == * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:686|686]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Prince Ōtsu|Prince Ōtsu]] 、皇族（* [[:en:663|663]] ） * [[:en:Shuchō|Shuchō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:686|686]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Princess Yamanobe|Princess Yamabe]] 、皇族 * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:790|790]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - {{ill|Saeki Imomochi|ja|佐伯今毛人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saeki Imomochi|1=Saeki no Imaemishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11382787}} 、[[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] の貴族（* [[:en:719|719]] ） * [[:en:Jōhō|Shōhō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1074|1074]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） - [[:en:Empress Shōshi|Fujiwara Akiko]] （上東門院）、[[:en:Emperor Go-Suzaku|Emperor Go-Suzaku]] の母・{{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} の子（* [[:en:988|988]] ） * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1537|1537]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） - {{ill|Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|ja|三条西実隆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|1=Sanjōnishi Sanetaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11355856}} 、{{ill|poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/poet|1=waka poet|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11122954}} （* [[:en:1455|1455]] ） * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|1=Genki|2=ja|3=元亀|WD=Q1145064|lt=Genki Era|Genki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1145064}} 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1571|1571]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） - [[:en:Hōjō Ujiyasu|Hojo Ujiyasu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} （* [[:en:1515|1515]] ） * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Natsuka Masaie|Nagasuka Masakazu]] 、{{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} （* [[:en:1562|1562]] ） * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3rd year [[:en:Intercalation (timekeeping)|Intercalary]] ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1650|1650]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） - [[:en:Mōri Hidemoto|Mōri Hidemoto]] 、[[:en:Chōfu Domain|Chōfu Domain]] 主（* [[:en:1579|1579]] ）

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .

* {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:676|676]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） - 神に新穀を捧げる{{ill|Sōshoku-sai|ja|相嘗祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōshoku-sai|1=Ainame Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11581944}} を初めて挙行{{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * [[:en:Kennin|Ken'nin]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ） - [[:en:Unkei|Unkei]] と[[:en:Kaikei|Kaikei]] が[[:en:Tōdai-ji|Tōdai-ji]] 南大門の金剛力士像を完成させる * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]] ） - {{ill|Sōmon ninbetsuchō|ja|宗門人別帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōmon ninbetsuchō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宗門人別改帳|1=shūmon ninbetsu aratame chō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11452068}} を廃止
== Births == * [[:en:An'ei|Annin]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1778|1778]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ） - [[:en:Kunitomo Ikkansai|Kuniyoshi Ikkan-sai]] 、{{ill|Inventor|ja|発明家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inventor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=inventor|WD=Q205375}} （+ [[:en:1840|1840]] ） * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1848|1848]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ） - [[:en:Ueno Riichi|Ueno Riichi]] 、[[:en:The Asahi Shimbun|Asahi Shimbun]] 創業（+ [[:en:1919|1919]] ）

[[:en:Empress Shōshi|Fujiwara Akiko]] （上東門院）、[[:en:Emperor Go-Suzaku|Emperor Go-Suzaku]] の母・{{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} の子（* [[:en:988|988]] ） * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1537|1537]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） - {{ill|Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|ja|三条西実隆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanjō Nishimitsutaka|1=Sanjōnishi Sanetaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11355856}} 、{{ill|poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/poet|1=waka poet|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11122954}} （* [[:en:1455|1455]] ） * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|1=Genki|2=ja|3=元亀|WD=Q1145064|lt=Genki Era|Genki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1145064}} 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1571|1571]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） - {{Not to be confused with|October 3|qq=October 3}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q335181}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|676|en|676|WD=Q31098|lt=676|1=676}} {{ill|November 13|en|November 13|WD=Q2984|lt=November 13|1=November 13}} ） - 神に新穀を捧げる{{ill|Sōshoku-sai|ja|相嘗祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōshoku-sai|1=Ainame Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11581944}} を初めて挙行{{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * {{ill|Kennin|en|Kennin|WD=Q1195433|lt=Ken'nin|1=Kennin}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1203|en|1203|WD=Q5227|lt=1203|1=1203}} {{ill|November 8|en|November 8|WD=Q2990|lt=November 8|1=November 8}} ） - {{ill|Unkei|en|Unkei|WD=Q2006048|lt=Unkei|1=Unkei}} と{{ill|Kaikei|en|Kaikei|WD=Q3191958|lt=Kaikei|1=Kaikei}} が{{ill|Tōdai-ji|en|Tōdai-ji|WD=Q460367|lt=Tōdai-ji|1=Tōdai-ji}} 南大門の金剛力士像を完成させる * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} {{ill|November 15|en|November 15|WD=Q2982|lt=November 15|1=November 15}} ） - {{ill|Sōmon ninbetsuchō|ja|宗門人別帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōmon ninbetsuchō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宗門人別改帳|1=shūmon ninbetsu aratame chō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11452068}} を廃止
== Births == * {{ill|An'ei|en|An'ei|WD=Q1193910|lt=Annin|1=An'ei}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1778|en|1778|WD=Q7713|lt=1778|1=1778}} {{ill|November 21|en|November 21|WD=Q3023|lt=November 21|1=November 21}} ） - {{ill|Kunitomo Ikkansai|en|Kunitomo Ikkansai|WD=Q1079978|lt=Kuniyoshi Ikkan-sai|1=Kunitomo Ikkansai}} 、{{ill|Inventor|ja|発明家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inventor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Inventor|WD=Q205375}} （+ {{ill|1840|en|1840|WD=Q7619|lt=1840|1=1840}} ） * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1848|en|1848|WD=Q7647|lt=1848|1=1848}} {{ill|October 29|en|October 29|WD=Q2951|lt=October 29|1=October 29}} ） - {{ill|Ueno Riichi|en|Ueno Riichi|WD=Q11360404|lt=Ueno Riichi|1=Ueno Riichi}} 、{{ill|The Asahi Shimbun|en|The Asahi Shimbun|WD=Q720503|lt=Asahi Shimbun|1=The Asahi Shimbun}} 創業（+ {{ill|1919|en|1919|WD=Q2157|lt=1919|1=1919}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shuchō|en|Shuchō|WD=Q777413|lt=Shuchō|1=Shuchō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|686|en|686|WD=Q30619|lt=686|1=686}} {{ill|October 25|en|October 25|WD=Q2954|lt=October 25|1=October 25}} ） -
